items.claim: Co is a better wrestler than John Paul.
items.quote: I think he probably is a little bit of a better wrestler

items.claim: Co has high-level cardio and does not get tired during fights.
items.quote: This guy didn't get [__] tired. Like Oban Elliot, he wasn't like hardly tired at all.

items.claim: John Paul slows down once he starts getting hit.
items.quote: John Paul once he started to get hit a little bit, you saw him in that Phil Row fight kind of slow down, slow down.

items.claim: Jose Delgado has holes in his takedown defense.
items.quote: Takedown defense definitely has some holes in it, though.

items.claim: Austin Bashi is a better grappler than he is a striker.
items.quote: He's definitely a better grappler than he is striker.

items.claim: Austin Bashi is a better wrestler than Andre Phy.
items.quote: Austin Bashy is a much better wrestler than Andre Phy is.

items.claim: The location of the fight (Oklahoma vs. Las Vegas) will influence how judges score takedowns.
items.quote: if we're in Las Vegas, just like Jose Delgado's last fight, they won't give a [__] about Austin's takedowns. They just won't. In Oklahoma, they might.
